programme.title: Hip Hop: The Songs That Shook America
programme.desc: ROCK BOX by Run-DMC: How one song tore down the barriers between rock & hip hop, race and class on American radio and television.

programme.title: Hip Hop: The Songs That Shook America
programme.desc: ELEVATORS by OutKast: Hip hop's southern voice breaks through with an unsuspecting song that redefines rap's cultural and geographic boundaries.

programme.title: Hip Hop: The Songs That Shook America
programme.desc: THE BRIDGE by Marley Marl and MC Shan: A song designed to foster community pride, ignites hip hop's most epic rap battle.

programme.title: Hip Hop: The Songs That Shook America
programme.desc: LADIES FIRST by Queen Latifah: At the height of hip hop's misogynistic themes, the culture bows down to their queens of rap.

programme.title: James Brown: The Man, The Music & The Message
programme.desc: James Brown: The Man, The Music & The Message is an inspiring and entertaining program about the remarkable life of \\"The Godfather Soul\\" that features his greatest hits including "Living in America" and "I Feel Good."

programme.title: Jay-Z: Ultimate Hustle
programme.desc: It was hardly predictable when the boy from the Brooklyn projects became the world's first billionaire hip-hop star, Jay-Z. He turned his pain into passion and used the suffering to influence the words and lyrics in his music.

programme.title: Kiss: Live in Las Vegas
programme.desc: This is the concert the world never got to see from the biggest live act in the music business. Go onstage with the world's hottest band as they perform the show over one billion people missed when the Internet servers crashed.

programme.title: Lady Gaga: Glory
programme.desc: While an outrageous fashion sense, elaborate videos, and spectacular stage sets are her norm, it's the music of 'Monster Mother' Lady Gaga that has led to her explosive career full of fame and accolades.

programme.title: Madonna: The Name of the Game
programme.desc: Madonna's eclectic and distinct cult of personality has captivated fans and detractors alike since she first came onto the scene, though few know of the years of hard work and struggles the artist endured to reach the apex of her industry, until now.

programme.title: Mariah Carey: Grit & Glamour
programme.desc: A Cinderella story of sorts, Mariah Carey. Songbird Supreme. Queen of Christmas. Dedicated philanthropist. Mariah has sold over 220 million records and released the best-selling Christmas album ever.

programme.title: Mighty Good: The Beatles
programme.desc: No musical group has had as profound an impact on pop music as The Beatles. Tony Palmer’s groundbreaking documentary gives us an intimate look at one of the most influential groups in musical history.

programme.title: Music Talks: Nas
programme.desc: Music industry titan Andre Harrell sits down with the legendary Nasir Jones (Nas) for an inside look into his journey in the music industry, his philanthropy, and the arts.

programme.title: Music Talks: Queen Latifah
programme.desc: Music industry titan Andre Harrell sits down with the legendary Queen Latifah for an inside look at her journey through the avenues of the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Post Malone: On His Terms
programme.desc: For reasons unknown Post Malone changed his last name to his first name, then chose his surname from a rap generator. See how he went on to sell 80 million records and win 10 Billboard Music Awards.

programme.desc: Ana saborea el plato de la venganza, mientras que Leslie se limpia las lágrimas con su orgullo. Un divertido día de playa se convierte en una pesadilla. La llegada del nuevo ex cambia el juego y La Divaza tira los dados cuando no es su turno.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Veo, veo y no veo claro

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Aquí se arma la de cantina
programme.desc: Leslie e Isaac se hacen novios. Una discusión provoca que Lizbeth le moje las pestañas a Ali y se desate la guerra. El nuevo ex se lleva la sorpresa de encontrarse con dos ex-amores. Rufas tiene las llaves de la Love Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Los demonios bailan en la villa
programme.desc: Rufas le rompe el corazón a Carolina. A Jey le toca escena de celos doble. La sala tornado sopla todos los chismes de Brandon. El lobo está enjaulado mientras que Yess le hace piojitos. Una fiesta empieza bien y termina con la llegada de un ex.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Efectos instantáneos
programme.desc: Yess se dio tragos hasta encontrar el más amargo. Los bandos tratan de encontrar la paz, pero solo tratan. Isaac ya no puede forzar la máquina y termina a Leslie. Unas pócimas mágicas llenas de alcohol hacen efecto inmediato en los influencers.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: ¡Que viva la toxicidad!
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Ali dan los votos a su amor tóxico, mientras que los salvados dan sus votos a la soltería. La Love Suite se abre por última vez con un trío muy caliente.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: 10 influencers llegan a sus vacaciones en el caribe, pero la "Tablet del Karma" les recuerda que deben saldar cuentas con sus Ex. Asaf elige a Lilian para su corazon.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las advertencias de Valentino se convierten en amenazas. A Alex le regalan un shot, pero en la cara. Llega un nuevo Ex y los celos llenan a la villa de problemas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami has a horrifying run in with Bartholomew Kuma, Perona becomes the latest lady to vanish, and Chopper, Franky, and Usopp team up to strike a blow against Oars!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kuma has an upsetting message for Moria, Luffy loses track of his intended target, and Zoro attempts to harness the power of a new sword during his battle with Oars!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook arrives with the salt needed to stop Oars, but the monster shows off some special new abilities. Deep in the forest, Luffy makes some new friends who help him power up!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook joins the fight as the Straw Hats valiantly try to hold off Oars and Moria until Luffy returns. Unfortunately, even their combined powers are no match for these evil enemies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oars and Moria ruthlessly pummel the badly beaten Straw Hats. The situation looks bleak until the shocking arrival of Nightmare Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After Luffy's shadow power disappears, he'll need help from rest of the Straw Hats to land a devastating finishing blow in his battle against Oars.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Moria gobbles up every shadow in sight to power up for a final showdown with Luffy. Can the Straw Hats save the day before the dawn reduces them all to ashes!?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle between Luffy and Moria reaches its epic end, and the gargantuan shadow of the towering brute known as Kuma causes a panic on the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kuma is ordered by the World Government to obliterate every living being on the island, but the Straw Hats – battered as they may be – refuse to go down without a fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A heated confrontation occurs between Zoro and Sanji as they argue over who will sacrifice themselves to save Luffy, but Kuma's final attack may be worse than death.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji learns the truth about Zoro's amazing sacrifice, and Brook is overjoyed to learn that Laboon is still alive and doing fine!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback reveals the story of how Laboon and Brook became friends – and the promise that was made at the hour of their sorrowful parting of the ways.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook remembers the painful loss of his beloved captain, the tragic end to his musical pirate crew, and his lonely days as a skeleton adrift in the shadows.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook officially signs on as the newest member of the Straw Hats, and Luffy learns that his brother Ace may be in some serious trouble.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats encounter two young girls who are looking for their father, and Luffy has another run in with the devious Captain Foxy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats attempt to destroy a floating resort in order to reunite two sisters who possess a blueprint for making jewels!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook struggles to adjust to life among living after so many years alone in the darkness. Can the Straw Hats survive his chaotic attempts to fit in?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After surviving a terrible storm to reach the entrance to the Red Line, Luffy slugs a mysterious sea monster and Sanji may finally get to meet a mermaid!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats agree to help a mermaid rescue her friend, but the mission gets dangerous when a gang of flying fish dive bomb their boat!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats agree to join Camie's rescue mission, but her captured friend turns out to be a dangerous enemy from the past!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats wage a death-defying battle with a group of flying fish, and Luffy is shocked by the familiar face of their latest enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji squares off against his lookalike, Camie shows off just how fast a mermaid can swim, and Luffy defeats a giant bull without even landing a blow!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After their showdown with Duval, Luffy and the Straw Hats enjoy a hearty meal before proceeding to the site of their next adventure – an island bursting with bubbles!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stop at an island overflowing with bubbles to get their ship modified for underwater travel, but it's not long before they stumble upon an outrageous explosion and attract unwanted attention.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shakky explains why Sabaody Archipelago seems to be crawling with bounty hunters – eleven of the Grand Line's most wanted pirates are currently ashore and two of them are in Luffy's crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger keeps Zoro from tangling with a powerful Celestial Dragon, and Chopper goes bonkers when Camie disappears from the amusement park.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Camie was abducted by a dastardly gang of kidnappers, and her next stop is the auction house unless the Straw Hats can rescue her. To make it in time, they'll have to hitch a ride on some flying fish!

programme.desc: Danny and the Count's Kustoms crew rally together to help Shannon restore his father's long lost chopper. Meanwhile, Danny does a do-over on his customized 1990 Chevy Suburban.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: A customer is brought to tears when the shop presents him with a chopper dedicated to his lost mother.

programme.title: Counting Cars

programme.title: Counting Cars

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin's brother is a judge, but that won't get him a free ride, and the guys struggle to finish his '62 Chevy pick-up within budget. Later, Scott spots an incredibly rare Corvette, but will he screw up the deal without Danny's help?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and Kevin visit mad mechanic Gordon to see his latest insane creation. Meanwhile, Danny shakes the rust off a '34 Ford and tries to turn it into a white hot-hot rod, completely engulfed in flames.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny impulsively buys a '69 Caddy and falls madly in love with her. Will he sell it for a big profit, or add her to his collection?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny sees something in his shop that makes him very uncomfortable, emptiness.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess..

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt, Lou, and Lyndah try to repo a car from a man who is not afraid to throw some punches. Then, Matt and Lou face a dilemma when they realize their target vehicle is filled with angry bees. And, Sonia and Froy hit the airwaves to reclaim a truck.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities with a collection of wealthy wives. Then, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a business dispute when they try to sneak off.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: A Star For Christmas
programme.desc: Cupcakery owner Cassie can't help falling for her hunky new customer. But when he turns out to be action superstar Alex Gray, will their relationship survive Hollywood and the holidays?

programme.desc: Two women magically switch bodies during the holidays and teach each other valuable lessons about family, love, and Christmas cheer.

programme.title: Another Christmas Kiss

programme.desc: It's "Beauty & the Beast" at Christmas when Belle meets cantankerous Hunter, but soon he begins to warm…putting their work and Belle's heart at risk.

programme.desc: Two sisters' only wish is to spend the holidays as a family, forcing their divorced parents to work out their issues and find love again.

programme.desc: This Christmas three women plot revenge on the guy who cruelly dumped them all. But will vengence be worth risking a chance at new love?

programme.title: The 4:30 Movie

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: A playboy tries to win over the girl of his dreams when he discovers she has no short-term memory.

programme.title: The Night Watchmen

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Mr. Mom

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are welcomed to the forge with a curveball--they must utilize questionable steel from mining tools to forge a blade in their signature style. Given the option to add high carbon steel to their knives, the smiths make risky decisions.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four competitors must demonstrate edged-weapon mastery when tasked with turning salvaged junkyard steel into a weapon. Only two forge ahead to the final round to recreate the legendary Charay sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four previous competitors return to the forge for a second chance. The competitors must forge their signature blade using only the recycled steel from a jackhammer.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: It's double the competitors and double the heat in this first ever team challenge. Masters compete alongside their apprentices as they are forced to take turns on the forge floor.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight men come to the Broken Skull Ranch to battle one another in Rip Off, Loaded and Dead Weight. But will the last man standing defeat the Skullbuster and walk away with the $10,000?

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight female military veterans battle in Rip Off, Loaded and Dead Weight. But only one will have a shot at the Skullbuster and a chance at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight male athletes tussle in Drag Race, Pile Up and Splinter. But only one man gets to take on the Skullbuster for a shot at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight formidable female athletes compete in Drag Race, Pile Up and Splinter. One will earn the right to take on the Skullbuster for an opportunity to win $10,000.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Two of America's most successful criminal masterminds and their brutal gangs go head to head. Jesse James' Gang of gun-slinging, sharp-shooting bank robbers battle Al Capone's Gang of notorious, bullet-spewing Tommy Gun mobsters.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Ming Warrior, the vicious death dealer who used exploding land-mines and fire arrows to launch China's greatest empire battles the Musketeer, an elite French fighter who blasted enemies with a gut-busting musket.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: An epic match featuring the Comanche, the fierce, Native American killer against the Mongol, the barbaric warrior who conquered more territory than any empire in history.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens hit the streets of Hollywood to prank unsuspecting passers-by. RuPaul's extra special guest judges are funny lady Rachel Dratch and the world's first supermodel, Janice Dickinson.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: Legendary children Kady Z, Jillian Hervey and Kelly Osbourne join the queens to form All Star girl groups in a battle of the divas for the fiercest set. Rosie Perez and Mary Wilson of the Supremes guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The final four assume super hero and super foe alter egos and go to epic heights to vanquish their nemesis. RuPaul is joined by guest judges actress/comedian Wendi McClendon – Covey and Mistress of the Dark Elvira.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: A former gang banger's murder leads Brenda to Father Jack (MARK ROLSTON - "Cold Case"), a community leader in a neighborhood upset with the LAPD. Brenda must rectify the situation.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Brenda's team investigates the shooting death of a popular online "hook-up king." Pope does a rotation as a member of Brenda's squad to get a firsthand look at how the team works.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: A shootout leaves two cops and a teenage neo-Nazi dead, with lots of unanswered questions as to what happened and who else might have been involved. MARY McDONNELL guest stars.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: A man is murdered who, 10 years ago, was the lead suspect in the murder of two girls. TOM SKERRITT ("Picket Fences") guest stars as a detective who comes out of retirement to help.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: A confessed murderer gets details of the crime wrong during his allocution, causing Brenda to reopen the case. SOSIE BACON (Sedgwick's daughter) guest stars as Brenda's niece.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: A box with a body stuffed inside leads Brenda in search of suspects. Meanwhile, Brenda's niece (SOSIE BACON) pulls a stunt so severe that Brenda and Fritz want to send her home.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: A shooting in a school parking lot leaves one person dead, another person critically wounded and a car loaded with marijuana.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: XANDER BERKELEY ("24") is a Texas detective investigating a similar crime to one in LA. Brenda's dad (BARRY CORBIN) arrives to take Charlie (SOSIE BACON). KEVIN BACON directs.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: The squad investigates the death of a 12-year-old boy whose father and brother are both gang members. Meanwhile, Fritz brings home a surprise for Brenda.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Several old cases come up for review, including one Provenza closed years ago with his former partner, Detective Andrews (guest star BEAU BRIDGES - "The Fabulous Baker Boys").

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Capt. Raydor (recurring guest star MARY McDONNELL) approaches Major Crimes about delicately looking into a possible case of spousal abuse. Meanwhile, Fritz feels ignored by Brenda.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: In the sixth season premiere, the team's investigation is hindered by a missing murder weapon, and the difficult adjustment of moving their offices into a new building.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Capt. Raydor (MARY McDONNELL -- Battlestar Galactica) accompanies Brenda on an investigation but her real purpose in taking part could have big career implications for Brenda.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Investigating a suicide, the squad gets into a nasty child-custody dispute. Pope applies for the police chief job, but Brenda may have an opinion about whether or not he gets it.

programme.title: Heist
programme.desc: A jewel thief's nephew is sent along on a heist to ensure a longtime partner in crime stays honest about the division of the loot.

programme.desc: Jake Gittes, a private eye, uncovers a web of personal and political scandals while he is hired by a beautiful socialite to investigate her husband's extra marital affair.

programme.title: The Yards
programme.desc: After being released from prison, Leo Handler (Mark Wahlberg) takes a job with his powerfully influential Uncle Frank (James Caan). Leo soon finds himself unwittingly drawn into a world of sabotage, high-stakes payoffs, and even murder.

programme.title: Bio-Dome
programme.desc: In this outrageous Comedy, five brave scientists are forced to face life forms more perplexing, more terrifying, more annoying than anything they've ever encountered: Pauly Shore and Stephen Baldwin.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: No mortal endured more terrible a tragedy than Oedipus. He was the son of King Laius, King of Thebes.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Located in the bowels of the Earth, Tartarus was the prison of the Underworld, the place where fallen Gods and banished heroes ended up.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Antigone was one of Oedipus’ four children. She had two brothers, Eteocles and Polynices, as well as a sister, Ismene.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: A golden apple inscribed 'for the fairest' is sent to a feast at Olympus. Unable to decide between the goddesses Aphrodite, Hera and Athena, Zeus decides to let a mortal choose.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: All of the Greek kings and their armies have responded to Agamemnon's call. All except two, that is, Odysseus and Achilles.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Ten years have passed since the Greek forces arrived in Troy, but King Priam's city has still not fallen. The king's eldest son, Hector, reproaches his brother Paris for causing this war with no end.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Agamemnon has seen it in a dream, Troy will be taken today. Helen's husband Menelaus recognizes Paris, the man who took his wife. The two men decide to face each other in a duel.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The chaos that reigns between Greeks and Trojans has now spread to Mount Olympus. Back on the battlefield, the Trojans have driven back the Greeks and decided to build a long wall.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Odysseus and Ajax try to convince Achilles to return to combat, but the Greek warrior rejects their appeals. On the battlefield, Agamemnon, Diomedes and even Odysseus are injured one after the other.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Saved by Apollo, Hector goes back on the attack and leads the Trojans as far as the Greeks' ships. Patroclus, a childhood friend of Achilles, rushes to him and implores him to re-join the battle.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Thetis asks Hephaestus, the god of blacksmiths to forge new armour and weapons for her son Achilles. At dawn, she hands them to him, knowing that they will lead to his death.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The River Scamander and its banks are set alight by fireballs sent by the god Hephaestus. The river god spares Achilles, who immediately goes back on the rampage. The gods are shocked by his rage.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The Trojans are surprised to discover that the Greeks have suddenly left the shores of Troy, leaving only a wooden horse. Inside the horse, Greek warriors remain silent and still.

programme.desc: Archer visits Shran's icy homeworld to find an Andorian subspecies called the Aenar, to determine their connection to the marauder destroying ships in the region.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: While Enterprise visits Earth for the launch of Columbia, Phlox is kidnapped and forced to help the Klingons deal with a grave threat toward their species.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: As far back as the Bronze Age, humans were building ships capable of crossing oceans and trading.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Even before the start of recorded history, ancient engineers were erecting giant monuments.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The Rockies. Magnificent and awe-inspiring mysterious, the Rockies are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world. Naked Science investigates the geological processes that build these massive mountains.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Naked Science investigates the violent cosmological forces that create planets and discover what it is that makes a planet a planet.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: New satellites are being launched to continue detailed observations of Earth and its oceans and ice caps. They are finding that climate change is accelerating and they have the data to prove it.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: NASA's Parker Solar Probe Mission is on its way and will be shortly followed by Europe's Solar probe Mission. No spacecraft has traveled so fast or so close to a star before. The hope is to reveal the source of the solar winds that affect Earth.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The commercial space flight companies are edging closer and closer to flight readiness. Paying customers will soon be launching into space; tourist revenue is projected to be a major stepping stone toward space exploration and colonization.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The ESA-JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch. The target is Mercury which has been too long neglected; this mission will shed new light on this strange world of light and dark.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid Sample Return Mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock, ready to dip down to acquire its sample. The return of asteroid material to Earth will aid scientists in the development of planetary defense systems.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Space: Getting There
programme.desc: The new surge in space transportation, privately owned companies vying for government contracts and private entrepreneurs looking to build hotels in space.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: Chances are, you are watching this program by satellite, one way or the other. Every day we use these wonders of human design, from communication and weather observation, to GPS and recourse management.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Shore to Shore
programme.desc: With low Earth orbit delegated to private companies, NASA is free to develop the deep space hardware for missions to Mars and beyond. The Orion space craft and SLS launch system are well on their way to delivering this capability.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The first decade of the 1900s ushers in crucial inventions that will help shape the rest of the century. Communication gets a boost as a voice is transmitted wirelessly by radio for the first time.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Saving lives and taking lives are the hallmarks of the inventions of the 1910s. From charcoal to lightly browned.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Mobsters, jazz, and turbulent economic times mark the 1920s. Silent film makes the transition to the talkies as sound comes to the silver screen. Criminals find that there's one less place to hide with the invention of the lie detector.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Though overshadowed by the Great Depression, there is no shortage of ingenuity in the 1930s. The two-way radio gets miniaturized, and the world's first portable walkie-talkie goes on the air.

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: Truman doesn’t realize that his quaint hometown is a giant studio set run by a visionary producer/director/creator (Ed Harris), that folks living and working there are Hollywood actors, that even his incessantly bubbly wife is a contract player.

programme.title: Fun with Dick and Jane (2005)
programme.desc: When an affluent couple lose all their money following a series of blunders, they turn to a life of crime to make ends meet.

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: A thrilling misadventure involving three ingenious orphans and a villainous actor named Count Olaf (Jim Carrey) who wants their enormous fortune.

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: Truman doesn’t realize that his quaint hometown is a giant studio set run by a visionary producer/director/creator (Ed Harris), that folks living and working there are Hollywood actors, that even his incessantly bubbly wife is a contract player.

programme.desc: Sex. Money. Power. Drugs. Brace yourself for a true story from legendary filmmaker Martin Scorsese. Leonardo DiCaprio stars as a young stockbroker hungry for a life of non-stop thrills, where corruption was king and more was never enough.

programme.desc: The Man With No Name (Clint Eastwood) receives offers from two gangs terrorizing a small town and accepts both, setting in motion a plan to destroy the criminals in a series of brilliantly orchestrated setups, showdowns, and deadly confrontations.

Kate accepts a lucrative opportunity to lead a thrill-seeking millionaire businessman on a shark dive in the most dangerous waters, outside the cage.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.desc: Misty's Horsea desperately needs exercise, so the gang decides to take it to her sisters' Gym in Cerulean City. There, she learns that her sisters are planning an exciting underwater ballet.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes make their way to Viridian City, where Ash hopes to earn the Earth Badge. They get to the Gym just in time to see his rival, Gary, being defeated by an unknown Pokémon—and Gary insists that it's evil!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Meanwhile, Zhao plans an attack and Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: On their way to Omashu, the kids become lost in the treacherous "Cave of Two Lovers."

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang enters Omashu so he can learn Earthbending from King Bumi, but the city is in the hands of the Fire Nation!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being "connected to the Earth" from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang must clear up a wave of anti-Avatar sentiment and atone for something he did in the past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a possible Earthbending mentor at an underground tournament.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Traveling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town, where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids are prevented from taking the "easy way" into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city from invasion.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A series of short stories, highlighting different characters and their individual adventures in the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet, but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng the Dai Li when they attempt to show the Earth King the vast conspiracy taking place in his city.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker is taking some kids on a tour of the Texas Ranger Hall of Fame. When one of them asks him to tell them about a Ranger, Walker chooses to talk about Hayes Cooper.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker continues to tell the story of Hayes Cooper. And he continues when Cooper upon seeing the family he befriended killed, he sets out to go after the ones he believes responsible for their deaths.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A boy with telepathic powers escapes the laboratory where he was living since his mother supposedly died. He learns his mother is alive so he contacts Walker to ask for assistance. The doctors try to destroy evidence and kill witnesses.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Feeling that merely locking up criminals is not making a dent in the crime rate, Walker makes a proposal for new kind reformatory, before Senator Kay Hutchinson.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A horse owner tries to bolster his horses' value by making sure they win all their races. But when another owner puts a crimp on his plans he kills the man and the trainer who was in his pocket.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Thanks to Alex's lawyer father, Alfre is released from prison. She gets a job at a construction site and soon finds the contractor is cutting corners and safety factors. She is in danger before she can report it to Alex and the Rangers.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Two orphans go to a foster home with a couple who plan to adopt them. The children hear the parents talking and misinterpret what they hear. They fear being sent back to the orphanage so they run away. While out, they witness a murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Old family conflicts resurface when Officer Luann Corbin's brother Tyler is released from prison and moves back home, driving a wedge between Luann, who thinks it’s a bad idea and that Tyler will never change, and her mother, who welcomes him.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Obsessed with his ex-girlfriend, a disturbed teenager kills her new boyfriend and pins the murder on her stepfather. Althea sees the teen’s hostility at school and realizes how dangerous he is. Can he be stopped from making one more fatal mistake?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Althea Tibbs struggles with depression after witnessing the shocking suicide of a student, and the dead teen’s ex-girlfriend starts dating a guy with a criminal record, who she’s desperate to flee Sparta with to escape from her abusive stepfather.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie is reunited with his daughter Lana, when she comes to Sparta to settle her inheritance, but she’s been followed by her mother’s ex-boyfriend, who claims that it all belongs to him, and he’s willing to take drastic measures to collect.

programme.desc: Dr. Travis gets involved in the treacherous and deadly trade of catering when he oversees the annual charity banquet.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan insists that a man he helped condemn to death for a series of bombings is guilty, even after a post-execution explosion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: In the premiere of the 15th season, Tom replaces sash balancers on an antique window. Roger and Kevin check out the benefits of a robotic lawnmower. And Richard talks about treating water with lead.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin visits Chicago to explore the dangers of home fires and ways to stay safe. Scott shows off a portable generator that doesn’t run on gas. The guys ask, “What is it?” And Richard finds a rusted sink strainer in the kitchen.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin use store-bought stair treads to create a bookshelf in Build It. And landscape designer Jenn Nawada transforms the look of a home’s foundation by using existing plants.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps plant a home orchard using apple and pear trees. Tom shows Kevin how to choose and use a circular saw. Richard installs a new tank water heater and discusses new regulations on them.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom repairs a broken board on a front porch. Richard analyzes a homeowner’s green-stained shower. Scott brings more power to a bedroom and is able to conceal the wiring with crown molding.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard learns about a way to heat and cool a house using a new room-by-room ventilation system. The guys ask, “What is it?” And Tom explains the best ways to patch a small hole in the wall.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Ross Trethewey helps build a robotic wall that could be the key to tight spaces in urban living. Tom and Kevin use reclaimed pine heart wood to create a bench with a historic theme in Build It.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard travels to Seattle to help a couple choose and install laundry appliances. Tom shows Kevin new table saw technology. And Scott repairs a three-way switch.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin install a home elevator. Jenn Nawada investigates how to grow microgreens. Tom explains the best way to match historic moldings. And Richard diagnoses a problem with well water.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom heads to Chicago to transform a one-car garage into a carpentry workshop. Scott installs a wireless light switch. Richard gives a history lesson on antique bath fixtures.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger rips up an old, dangerous walkway to replace it with bluestone. Scott explains the best wire nuts to use for each project. Kevin gets a lesson on making mead.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn shares an environmentally safe way to keep walkways safe. Tom gives a tutorial on hand saws. Richard diagnoses a hot water radiator problem. The guys ask “What is it?” Scott installs LED lights.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 4
programme.desc: On December 8th, 2012, Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought for their fourth and final fight. The bout ended in a stunning knockout victory for Marquez, solidifying their rivalry as one of the most memorable in boxing history.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2009, Manny Pacquiao fought Miguel Cotto for the WBO and WBC Diamond Welterweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Pacquiao put on a dominant performance, forcing the ref to stop the fight in round 12.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On December 6th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao battled Oscar De La Hoya at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a thrilling bout that lasted 8/12 rounds resulting in a victory for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Timothy Bradley III
programme.desc: On April 9th, 2016 Manny Pacquiao faced Timothy Bradley for the third time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO International Welterweight title in a 12 round bout Bradley went down in round 7 and 9 resulting in a success for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi
programme.desc: On March 10th, 1986 Marvin Hagler and John Mugabi fought at the Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena in Las Vegas for IBF, WBA and WBC world middleweight titles while Mugabi was ranked number 1 by all three bodies the fight ended in a victory for Hagler.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On April 15th, 1985, Marvin Hagler fought Thomas Hearns for the undisputed Middleweight Title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. Hagler and Hearns absolutely went at it from the bell which ended with Hagler securing a thrilling knockout victory.

programme.title: Matthew Saad Muhammad vs Yaqui Lopez 1
programme.desc: On October 24th, 1978 Matthew Saad Muhammad fought Yaqui Lopez for the first time for Light Heavyweight titles at the Spectrum in Philidelphia, in a 15 round bout that ended in the fourteenth round securing the victory for Muhammad.

programme.title: Michael Carabajal vs Jorge Arce
programme.desc: On July 31st, 1999 Michael Carabajal faced Jorge Arce for the WBO World Light flyweight title at Plaza de Toros El Toreo in Tijuana in a 12 round bout that went 11 rounds giving the bout to Carabajal.

programme.title: Michael Carbajal vs Humberto Gonzalez 1
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993, Michael Carbajal fought Humberto Gonzalez for the WBC and IBF Light Flyweight Titles in Las Vegas. After being knocked down twice earlier in the fight, Carbajal made an incredible comeback, knocking out Gonzalez in the 7th round.

programme.title: Micky Ward vs Alfonso Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997 Micky Ward and Alfonso Sanchez faced eachother at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas the 10 round bout ended after seven giving Ward the victory by technical knockout.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Antonio Margarito 2
programme.desc: On December 3rd, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Antonio Margarito in a highly anticipated championship rematch at the Madison Square Garden in New York. This time around, Cotto showed his dominance from the start and stopped Margarito in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2005 Miguel Cotto fought DeMarcus Corley for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at the Coliseo Ruben Rodriguez in Bayamon with Corley going down twice in the 5th round securing the technical knockout victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Delvin Rodriguez
programme.desc: On October 5th, 2013 Miguel Cotto battled Delvin Rodriguez at the Amway Center in Orlando, Fl. The originally twelve round bout lasted three rounds and ended by technical knockout in third round securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Joshua Clottey
programme.desc: On June 13th, 2009, Miguel Cotto fought Joshua Clottey for the WBO World Welterweight Title at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite Clottey landing more shots, Cotto was persistent with his attack, helping him earn a close split decision win.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Kelson Pinto
programme.desc: On September 11th, 2004 Miguel Cotto faced Kelson Pinto at the Coliseo Jose Miguel Agrelot in Hato Rey in battle for WBO World Super lightweight titles with the bout ending halfway through in the sixth round securing the win for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Muhammad Abdullaev
programme.desc: On June 11th, 2005 Miguel Cotto faced Muhammad Abdullaev for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York the twelve round bout ended in the ninth securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: On March 12th, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Ricardo Mayorga for the World Super Welterweight Championship at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight, Miguel Cotto prevailed, knocking down Mayorga in the final round and getting the stoppage.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Counting down the world's top 10 mysterious devices, from strange, grooved disks found in a cave in China to an ancient Greek computer to an incredible crystal skull unearthed in Mexico.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The Palm Springs getaway is anything but relaxing as tensions between Draya and Sundy erupt into full-blown mayhem. And in a tearful confession, Draya tells Jackie her daughter may not be as innocent as she thinks. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie develops a bottle for the cognac brand she hopes to launch. As payback for Palm Springs, Draya hosts all the ladies at an excruciating Mud Run. And Jackie forces a meeting with Draya to clear her daughter's name. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie and Chantel are over the situation with Draya and her boyfriend, but Draya and Orlando aren't done yet-- they confront the ladies in an attempt to put the issue to rest. Jackie invites the group on a trip to France. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The ladies head to France to launch Jackie's cognac, but divisions in the group threaten to spoil the trip and may be the end of Jackie and Malaysia's friendship. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: While in France, Jackie launches her cognac, Brittish gets a surprise present from her fiancé, Lorenzo, and Sundy's attempt to reconcile Malaysia and Jackie takes a nasty turn that ends up splintering the entire group. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie desperately tries to work her way back into the group's good graces. At Draya's 1st ever fashion show, new girl Mehgan introduces herself; but Draya, Brandi and Malaysia are skeptical since they know she's friends with Jackie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie shoots her 1st commercial and is overwhelmed by the chaos of directing. Mehgan and new friend Patrice support Jackie's endeavor, but later Mehgan starts calling Patrice "evil". Besties Draya & Malaysia fight for the 1st time. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia meets Jackie to discuss their issues. Shaunie O'Neal joins the group and learns of the heavy drama. Draya has critical thoughts on Mehgan's performance in Jackie's commercial, which Mehgan hears at the commercial premiere. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia meets Jackie to discuss their issues. Shaunie O'Neal joins the group and learns of the heavy drama. Draya has critical thoughts on Mehgan's performance in Jackie's commercial, which Mehgan hears at the commercial premiere. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: It's time for a weekend away in Santa Barbara and at a pre-party lunch, Jackie lets loose with every drink she can get her hands on. Draya gets the side eye when she introduces her "real" friend, Angel, to the group. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Santa Barbara comes to a dramatic end when Draya prompts Mehgan to question Jackie's loyalty. Jackie's actions towards Mehgan may prove unforgivable but, back in LA, Jackie puts the blame for all the group drama on Draya. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi and Mehgan bond over their hatred of crazy Jackie, and Mehgan plots her revenge for getting spit on. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Draya says some unforgivable things that leave her fledgling friendships on the line. Brandi and husband Jason try to reconcile their differences in couples therapy, but have Jason's actions caused too much damage to Brandi's heart? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi wins the group's support when the truth about Draya is revealed. Angel styles Malaysia at her luxury bedding photo shoot, but tensions arise when Malaysia disses Angel's risqué lingerie line. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends go to the dawn of the duel, to the place where it all began, to the land where the Pharaoh's mysteries lie: Egypt.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zorc's incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound. With a second chance at revenge, the bandit king has broken up the Pharaoh's team so that he can divide and conquer them one at a time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!
